apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the API version of the object.

status.description: Status is the current status of the User.

CollectorExporter.description: message CloudProvider {message Spec {message Cloudflare {// Email is the Cloudflare's account emailstring email = 1;// APIToken is the Cloudflare's API token.message APIToken {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}APIToken apiToken = 2;// Proxied sets the IP addresses to proxied mode. Not used currently.bool proxied = 3;}message AWS {// AccessKeyID is the `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID` value of your credentials.string accessKeyID = 1;// SecretAccessKey is the `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY` value for your// credentials.message SecretAccessKey {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}SecretAccessKey secretAccessKey = 2;// Region is the AWS region code (e.g. `us-east-1`).string region = 3;// AssumeRoleARN is the assumed role (e.g.// `arn:aws:iam::YYYYYYYYYYYY:role/dns-manager`)string assumeRoleARN = 4;}message DigitalOcean {message APIToken {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}APIToken apiToken = 1;}message Google {// Project is the GCP project name.string project = 1;message ServiceAccount {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}ServiceAccount serviceAccount = 2;}message Azure {message ClientSecret {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}string clientID = 1;ClientSecret clientSecret = 2;string subscriptionID = 3;string tenantID = 4;string resourceGroupName = 5;// Cloud is the Azure cloud environment, valid values are `public`,// `china`, `usgovernment` and `german`. Empty value is equivalent to// `public`.string cloud = 6;}message Linode {message APIToken {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}APIToken apiToken = 1;}message OVH {message ApplicationSecret {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}// Endpoint is the API endpoint (e.g. `ovh-eu`)string endpoint = 1;string applicationKey = 2;ApplicationSecret applicationSecret = 3;string consumerKey = 4;}message Alibaba {message AccessKeySecret {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}string accessKeyID = 1;AccessKeySecret accessKeySecret = 2;string regionID = 3;}message Hetzner {message APIToken {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}APIToken apiToken = 1;}message SMTP {message Password {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}string host = 1;int32 port = 2;string username = 3;Password password = 4;string from = 5;}message Postgresql {message Password {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}string username = 1;Password password = 2;string host = 3;int32 port = 4;string database = 5;bool noSSL = 6;}message Redis {message Password {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}string username = 1;Password password = 2;string host = 3;int32 port = 4;int32 database = 5;bool useTLS = 6;}message S3 {message SecretAccessKey {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}string endpoint = 1;string accessKeyID = 2;SecretAccessKey secretAccessKey = 3;bool noTLS = 4;string bucket = 5;string region = 6;}message ContainerRegistry {message Password {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}string server = 1;string username = 2;Password password = 3;string namespace = 4;}oneof type {Postgresql postgresql = 1;// Cloudflare is Cloudflare's specific options.Cloudflare cloudflare = 2;// AWS is AWS's Route53 specific options.AWS aws = 3;// Digitalocean is DigitalOcean's specific options.DigitalOcean digitalocean = 4;// Google is GCP's Cloud DNS specific options.Google google = 5;// Azure is Azure DNS specific options.Azure azure = 6;// Linode is Linode's specific options.Linode linode = 7;// OVH is OVH specific options.OVH ovh = 8;// Alibaba is Alibaba's specific options.Alibaba alibaba = 9;Hetzner hetzner = 10;SMTP smtp = 11;Redis redis = 12;S3 s3 = 13;ContainerRegistry containerRegistry = 14;}}message Status {}// APIVersion is the API version of the object.string apiVersion = 1;// Kind is the resource name (i.e. `User`).string kind = 2;// Metadata is the object's metadata.octelium.api.main.meta.v1.Metadata metadata = 3;// Spec is the User specification.Spec spec = 4;// Status is the current status of the User.Status status = 5;}message CloudProviderList {// APIVersion is the API version of the object.string apiVersion = 1;// Kind is the resource name (i.e. `CloudProviderList`).string kind = 2;// Items is the list of Users.repeated CloudProvider items = 3;// ListResponseMeta is common information about the list.octelium.api.main.meta.v1.ListResponseMeta listResponseMeta = 4;}

octelium.api.main.enterprise.v1.Collecto.description: message Loki {message Auth {message Bearer {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}message Custom {message Value {oneof type { string fromSecret = 1; }}string header = 1;Value value = 2;}oneof type {Bearer bearer = 1;Custom custom = 2;}}string endpoint = 1;map<string, string> headers = 2;Auth auth = 3;}

uid.description: UID is the unique UUID value for the object assigned by the Cluster. Read-only.

name.description: Name is the name of the object. It must be unique within a certain API/Version/Kind tuple.

createdAt.description: CreatedAt is the timestamp of creation of the object. Read-only.

updatedAt.description: UpdatedAt is the timestamp of when the object was last updated. Read-only.

displayName.description: DisplayName is the name that can be shown publicly for the object. Doesn't need to be unique.

description.description: Description is used to describe the object in a short sentence. Maximum characters are 1000.

labels.description: Labels is a map of string keys and values to organize objects.

tags.description: Tags is an optional array of tags that classify the Resource.

annotations.description: Labels is a map of string keys and values that can be used to store metadata about the object.

picURL.description: PicURL is the Picture URL of the resource.

resourceVersion.description: ResourceVersion is a unique ID that represent the current version of the resource object. Used by the Cluster to detect updates.

lastResourceVersion.description: LastResourceVersion is the ResourceVersion of the last update of the Resource.

actorRef.description: ActorRef is the object reference to the Actor resource, typically a Session, who is responsible for the current resource change. If ActorRef is not set, then the current change of the resource was done by the Cluster

actorOperation.description: ActorOperation is the gRPC full method triggered by the actorRef to modify the Resource

isSystem.description: IsSystem means that the resource is created by the Cluster and it cannot be managed by the administrators. Read-only.

specLabels.description: SpecLabels is map used internally by the Cluster for quick searches among lists of objects. Read-only.

isUserHidden.description: IsUserHidden means that the resource object is hidden from ordinary Users and should not be exposed via the User APIs.

isSystemHidden.description: IsSystemHidden means that the resource object is hidden by the Cluster and should not be exposed via the APIs.

systemLabels.description: SystemLabels is a similar map to specLabels. Used only by the Cluster.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the API version of the reference resource

kind.description: Kind is the resource kind. A kind is unique per an APIVersion.

uid.description: UID is the resource object UID. A UID is unique across the entire Cluster.

name.description: Name is the resource object name. A name is unique per a certain kind.

resourceVersion.description: ResourceVersion is the resourceVersion of the resource.
